Package org.eventb.internal.core.seqprover.eventbExtensions

Class OnePointProcessorInference

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.internal.core.seqprover.eventbExtensions.OnePointProcessor<Predicate>
org.eventb.internal.core.seqprover.eventbExtensions.OnePointProcessorInference
public class OnePointProcessorInference extends OnePointProcessor<Predicate>
Handles the processing for inference rules ONE_POINT_L and ONE_POINT_R. The following operations are performed:
  • finding the first replacement for a quantified bound identifier,
  • deleting this replacement from the tree representing the predicate,
  • instantiating the bound identifier with its corresponding expression in the predicate.
